Another $99/month subscription? I'm already worried about tax implications on crypto gains and now they want me to pay this much just to track my portfolio safely?
Okay, 47 five-star reviews but I need to check if any of my Telegram group members have actually used this wallet without getting hacked.
This setup guide is missing half the screenshots and doesn't explain what happens if the firmware update fails - I can't risk losing access to my crypto.
They want my email, phone, and ID verification just to see the basic features? This feels like a data collection scam waiting to happen.
Finally, a crypto tax tool that actually explains unrealized gains properly - this might help me stop being paralyzed by fear and actually start investing.
